mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is near zero and falling, equity discount rates stay compressed and liquidity conditions support higher S&P 500 prices over the next month. The signal is strongest when inflation is not accelerating, because a stable CPIAUCSL keeps the Fed from reversing easing quickly.
failure_condition: If 20-day forward SPX returns are not above baseline during low-or-falling FEDFUNDS periods, or if triggered months show negative average returns despite stable CPIAUCSL, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in UNRATE signals labor-market deterioration, weaker household income growth, and lower earnings expectations, which should pressure S&P 500 returns over the following month. The effect is clearest after a discrete unemployment shock rather than gradual drift.
failure_condition: Reject if months with UNRATE rising more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months do not produce below-baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if the sign reverses in more than 60% of such events.

mechanism_narrative: A broad rise in RSAFS captures stronger current nominal spending and revenue realization, which should support S&P 500 performance over a multi-week horizon through improved sales expectations and operating leverage. The signal fails when the sales gain is purely inflationary and not accompanied by real activity improvement.
failure_condition: Reject if positive monthly changes in RSAFS do not correspond to higher-than-baseline 20-day SPX returns over a rolling 3-year window, or if the effect disappears when RSAFS is flat or declining.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rebound in INDPRO after a prior contraction signals reopening of industrial capacity and improving earnings leverage for cyclicals, which should lift S&P 500 returns over about one quarter. The mechanism is strongest when output growth is not accompanied by an inflation surge that forces tighter policy.
failure_condition: Reject if strong 3-month INDPRO rebounds fail to predict positive 60-day SPX returns, or if the positive effect vanishes when CPIAUCSL accelerates sharply alongside INDPRO.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST and RSAFS both improve together, the economy is simultaneously strengthening in housing demand and consumer spending, which should translate into higher S&P 500 returns over the next month. The combined signal matters because each series alone is noisier than their joint confirmation.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with concurrent HOUST and RSAFS improvement do not outperform baseline on 20-day SPX returns, or if either series alone explains the effect as well as the joint condition.

mechanism_narrative: A FEDFUNDS level above 4.5% signals restrictive policy that raises discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month. The effect should be strongest when CPIAUCSL is also decelerating, because disinflation reduces the chance of policy relief.
failure_condition: Reject if high-FEDFUNDS episodes do not generate below-baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if the sign becomes positive when CPIAUCSL is falling and policy is clearly restrictive.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in PAYEMS indicates payroll contraction and weaker aggregate income, which should depress equity prices over a quarter as earnings forecasts are revised down. The signal is slower than the unemployment shock and therefore belongs on a longer horizon.
failure_condition: Reject if falling PAYEMS does not predict negative 60-day SPX returns on average, or if the relationship breaks down across multiple payroll contraction episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A negative GDP growth impulse in GDPC1 should forecast weaker equity returns over the following quarter because lower final demand reduces earnings expectations and raises recession odds. The effect is strongest when GDP weakens alongside labor deterioration, and it fails when the GDP move is later revised away.
failure_condition: Reject if quarter-to-quarter GDPC1 declines do not precede negative 60-day SPX returns, or if the predictive value disappears once UNRATE is included as a joint stress condition.
